clause_anchor.span: Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.

deviations.original_text: All incentive compensation and equity are subject to applicable clawback, recoupment, and forfeiture requirements under law, listing rules, and Company policy.
deviations.mutated_text: Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.
deviations.expected_redline_text: All incentive compensation and equity are subject to applicable clawback, recoupment, and forfeiture requirements under law, listing rules, and Company policy.

clause_anchor.span: During employment and for 36 months after separation, Executive will not provide services to any business that competes with Company anywhere in North America.

deviations.original_text: During employment and for six months after separation, Executive will not provide substantially similar executive services to a business unit that directly competes with a Company product or service for which Executive had material responsibility, but only to the extent enforceable under applicable law.
deviations.mutated_text: During employment and for 36 months after separation, Executive will not provide services to any business that competes with Company anywhere in North America.
deviations.expected_redline_text: During employment and for six months after separation, Executive will not provide substantially similar executive services to a business unit that directly competes with a Company product or service for which Executive had material responsibility, but only to the extent enforceable under applicable law.

clause_anchor.span: If Company terminates Executive's employment without Cause and not because of death or disability, Company will provide severance equal to 18 months of Executive's then-current base salary, paid in regular payroll installments, subject to Section 9.

deviations.original_text: If Company terminates Executive's employment without Cause and not because of death or disability, Company will provide severance equal to six months of Executive's then-current base salary, paid in regular payroll installments, subject to Section 9.
deviations.mutated_text: If Company terminates Executive's employment without Cause and not because of death or disability, Company will provide severance equal to 18 months of Executive's then-current base salary, paid in regular payroll installments, subject to Section 9.
deviations.expected_redline_text: If Company terminates Executive's employment without Cause and not because of death or disability, Company will provide severance equal to six months of Executive's then-current base salary, paid in regular payroll installments, subject to Section 9.

clause_anchor.span: Executive will receive an annual bonus equal to 60% of base salary for each calendar year in which Executive remains employed for at least one day.

deviations.original_text: Executive is eligible for a target annual bonus equal to 45% of base salary. Any bonus is discretionary unless a written bonus plan approved by Company states objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing, and Executive must remain employed through the payment date unless the written plan states otherwise.
deviations.mutated_text: Executive will receive an annual bonus equal to 60% of base salary for each calendar year in which Executive remains employed for at least one day.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Executive is eligible for a target annual bonus equal to 45% of base salary. Any bonus is discretionary unless a written bonus plan approved by Company states objective metrics, approval requirements, and payment timing, and Executive must remain employed through the payment date unless the written plan states otherwise.

distractors.span: Except for claims that cannot lawfully be arbitrated and claims for emergency injunctive relief, employment-related disputes will be resolved by individual arbitration before JAMS.
distractors.why_benign: The arbitration canary says individual arbitration of employment disputes is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The governing-law canary says Delaware law is acceptable.

distractors.span: Company will pay Executive an annualized base salary of $300,000, less required withholdings and deductions, payable in accordance with Company's regular payroll practices.
distractors.why_benign: A market base salary paid through regular payroll is expected and does not conflict with the playbook.

missing_info.topic: Golden-parachute and Section 280G change-in-control tax exposure
missing_info.context_anchor: Company anticipates acquisition interest during Executive's tenure and needs deal-readiness on golden-parachute and Section 280G exposure.
